steps.title: Identify the key evidence
steps.content: Waxbills spread seeds of native plants “at risk of extinction”—helping endangered species.

steps.title: Match the conclusion
steps.content:
Choice D directly inverts the opening's warning: “rather than harming,” these non-native birds provide an important benefit—which the evidence of seed-spreading confirms.

The other choices either introduce unsupported claims, address the wrong plants, or merely hedge rather than affirm the clear benefit shown.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
